headline: Exelon, FirstEnergy utilities’ RTO adder targeted by Maryland in FERC complaint
summary: Maryland state agencies asked the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission to end an extra 0.5% return the transmission owners earn for being PJM Interconnection members.

raw.headline: Exelon, FirstEnergy utilities’ RTO adder targeted by Maryland in FERC complaint

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Utilities Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: In uncertain markets, investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks. Benzinga offers latest analyst ratings & news for high-yield stocks in utilities sector.
